channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Shields outpoints Perkins to win 1st undisputed heavyweight bout in women's boxing
item.description: FLINT, Mich. (AP) — Claressa Shields unanimously outpointed Danielle Perkins on Sunday night in the first undisputed heavyweight bout in women’s boxing to remain undefeated. Shields, a two-time Olympic gold medalist with titles in five divisions, was in control of the fight from the start.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Raiders hire Chip Kelly as offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Chip Kelly is returning to the NFL as the Las Vegas Raiders' offensive coordinator, a person with knowledge of the decision said Sunday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the team hasn’t announced the hire.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohtani's return to pitching could come in May for World Series champion Dodgers
item.description:
Shohei Ohtani pitching for the Los Angeles Dodgers in May is "about right,” manager Dave Roberts said Saturday at the team's annual fan fest.
He reiterated that Ohtani won't pitch in the season-opening Japan Series against the Chicago Cubs on March 18-19 in Tokyo.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rowdies Forrest Lasso returns to field after season-ending injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) - The Tampa Bay Rowdies returned to the field this week for preseason and so did veteran defender Forrest Lasso. After scoring two goals May 18, 2024, Lasso was named Player of the Week for his performance.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt fined $500K after fans storm basketball court after victory over Kentucky
item.description: Officials said Vanderbilt will need to pay the University of Kentucky $500,000 for a third offense under the league's current policy.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Guerry, NewsNation

item.title: Illinois snaps 2-game slide with 83-74 win over Northwestern in Champaign
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Kylan Boswell scored 17 points and had six rebounds to lead No. 17 Illinois over Northwestern, 83-74, a Big Ten matchup on Sunday. Morez Johnson Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
